name: replay_ready_gc_20260424_B_sandbox
outcome_goal: Root-cause the two replay-ready sandbox_error bugs (BUG-7C5D8AE4, BUG-39D02693), fix the failure, attach validates_fix evidence through the bug tracker surface, and confirm replay succeeds for both.
anti_requirements: Do not edit files outside the declared write_scope.
Do not revert dirty worktree changes made by parallel work.
Do not invent run_id, receipt_id, replay_run_id, or replay_receipt_id — read them from the bug packet.
Do not resolve FIXED without a validates_fix evidence link.
Do not call api.anthropic.com directly (Anthropic is CLI-only per standing order decision.2026-04-20.anthropic-cli-only-restored).
Do not paper over duplicated authority with compatibility shims; fix the root cause.
Do not widen scope to the other replay-ready bugs — those are owned by Spec C.

jobs.label: fix_sandbox_error_cluster
jobs.prompt:
Fix the replay-ready sandbox_error cluster: BUG-7C5D8AE4 (signature 04b2528b35) and BUG-39D02693 (signature 90e94ba32c). Both originated in `wave0_integrated_design` and surfaced through receipt_store aggregation.

## Before editing
1. Read `artifacts/workflow/replay_ready_gc_20260424_RECON.md` — this is the collision guard for this run. If it flags RED for your write_scope, stop and report; do not edit.
2. `praxis workflow bugs packet --bug-id BUG-7C5D8AE4` and `--bug-id BUG-39D02693` — read the resume_context and existing evidence links.
3. `praxis workflow bugs history --bug-id BUG-7C5D8AE4` and `--bug-id BUG-39D02693`.
4. `praxis workflow discover "sandbox_error"` and `praxis workflow discover "receipt failure aggregation"` — locate the canonical failure path.
5. `praxis workflow recall "sandbox runtime authority"` — policy context.

## Required outcome
- Identify the root cause of the sandbox_error failure class (not just suppress the symptom).
- If the two bugs share a root cause, make the fix dedupe them through the canonical receipt-failure aggregation (wave1 of the 2026-04-23 spec introduced this pattern — reuse, do not duplicate).
- Add or extend unit tests in `test_sandbox_runtime.py` / `test_receipt_store.py` that would catch this failure class before it reaches production.
- Stay inside the declared write_scope. If you need to edit outside it, stop and escalate via resume_context.

## Verification (must pass before resolving any bug)
- `PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_sandbox_runtime.py Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_receipt_store.py`
- `praxis workflow bugs replay --bug-id BUG-7C5D8AE4` returns a success envelope
- `praxis workflow bugs replay --bug-id BUG-39D02693` returns a success envelope

## Resolution
For each bug that replays green, attach `validates_fix` evidence and resolve:

```
praxis workflow bugs attach_evidence --bug-id <id> --evidence-kind verification_run --evidence-ref <verification_run_id> --evidence-role validates_fix
praxis workflow bugs resolve --bug-id <id> --status FIXED --verifier-ref verifier.job.python.pytest_file --inputs-json '{"path":"Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_sandbox_runtime.py"}'
```

If replay still fails, leave the bug OPEN with updated `resume_context` describing the exact blocker — do not mark FIXED on prose.
